/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,-soname,libggml-base.so.0 -o ../../bin/libggml-base.so.0.15.2 "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-alloc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-backend.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-backend-meta.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-opt.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-threading.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/ggml-quants.c.o" "CMakeFiles/ggml-base.dir/gguf.cpp.o"  -lm /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/11/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
